offset.$description: Gap between element and focus ring (2)

inverse.$description: Text on inverted surfaces (dark surface in light mode and vice versa), e.g. tooltips.

raised.$description: Cards and elements lifted above the default surface. Pair with Elevation/Raised.

overlay.$description: Dropdowns, popovers, modals - floats above everything. Pair with Elevation/Overlay or Modal.

sunken.$description: Recessed areas: wells, input backgrounds, code blocks.

bold.$description: High-emphasis border: selected states, table header rules.
